founders.name: Priya Shah
founders.title: CEO & Co-founder
founders.background: ex-Google Senior Software Engineer 6yrs (Search Infrastructure), ex-Stripe Product Manager 3yrs (Connect platform), BS+MS Computer Science MIT
founders.bio_text: Building the operating system for mid-market freight forwarders. Previously shipped infrastructure that touched 1B+ users at Google. We're hiring engineers who care about logistics that doesn't suck.

public_statements_30d.transcript_excerpt: Honestly the network deals dried up around month 6. We're hitting a wall on outbound — I've sent maybe 200 emails myself and the response rate is brutal. I'm an engineer, I shouldn't be the one writing cold emails.
